name: Lucky Star
overview: Having fun in school, doing homework together, cooking and eating, playing video games, watching anime. All those little things make up the daily life of the anime-and chocolate-loving-Izumi Konata and her friends.

trailers.title: Lucky Star Opening | Motteke! Sailor Fuku (Take It! Sailor Uniform) - Aya Hirano, Emiri Kato, Kaori Fukuhara and Aya Endo
